ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the weather condition */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the weather condition (1=Low, 2=Medium, 3=High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the season */,
  "average_humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user providing feedback */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the rental associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was provided */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicator if the feedback is anonymous (1=Yes, 0=No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bike station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bike station (number of bikes it can hold) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the station's data was updated */,
  "current_bike_count" INTEGER /* Current number of bikes available at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each weather condition
Icon or image representing the weather condition
Severity level of the weather condition (1=Low, 2=Medium, 3=High)
Date of the user's last login
Unique identifier for each feedback entry
Identifier for the user providing feedback
Identifier for the rental associated with the feedback
Rating given by the user (1 to 5 scale)
Date and time when the feedback was provided
Indicator if the feedback is anonymous (1=Yes, 0=No)
Unique identifier for each bike station
Capacity of the bike station (number of bikes it can hold)
Last time the station's data was updated
Current number of bikes available at the station
